0002.title: New Request 0002
0002.user_goal: Add a "Planning" tab to the financial page tabs. Under this tab, please add functionality for creating "Plans" which have two lists with records of monetary values and names: expenses and income. The expenses list will have the additional property of grouping by type. The user should be able to create expense groups, and then assign a new expense to a group or choose to have an expense unassigned. Please include a list of analytical data at the bottom of the two lists of a selected group. This information should display the percentage of expenses by expense type, give a warning if expenses exceed the listed income, and show any other relevant information to calculate and display in this window.
